summary: Comprehensive UI testing of the Kontengrafi landing page (major redesign). All 77 critical checks PASSED at 1920/1024/414 viewports. Hero tagline 'A helping hand behind every post' renders with serif italic blue accent on 'helping hand'. All sections render in order with correct data-testids: Navbar, Hero, BesideYou, PermissionCards (voice/shoot/approval), Process (3 numbered steps), Testimonials (marquee + 3 cards), Plans (starter/grow/studio with Grow highlighted + 'Paling Populer' badge), FAQ (8 accordion items, expand works), FinalCta (WhatsApp/Instagram/Email + 3 Ask AI buttons), Footer. Pinwheel SVG (4-petal mark) renders in navbar, hero corners, plans section and footer. Hero platform marquee loads simpleicons. Mobile hamburger toggles and reveals nav menu. No horizontal overflow at any viewport. No 'AI'/'kecerdasan buatan'/'artificial intelligence' is used as a Kontengrafi feature description (only the legitimate 'Tanya AI/ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity' third-party assistant links). All CTAs link correctly to wa.me / instagram.com/kontengrafi / mailto / target=_blank where required.

issues: A couple of simpleicons CDN slugs (notably 'instagram' and 'linkedin') return 404 from https://cdn.simpleicons.org/<slug>/14183A and render as broken image placeholders/alt-text 'Linkec' inside the marquee strip. Most icons (tiktok, youtube, pinterest, shopee, facebook, x, whatsapp, spotify) load fine. Consider switching to /14183a (lowercase hex) or omitting color, or self-hosting these two SVGs.

action_items: (LOW) Fix the 2 broken platform icons in the Hero marquee: simpleicons CDN paths for 'instagram' and 'linkedin' return 404 with the current color suffix. Try lowercase hex ('/14183a') or remove color param, or replace with lucide-react icons.
(OPTIONAL) Consider lazy-checking simpleicons CDN slugs at build time to avoid silent 404s if the brand list changes.
critical_code_review_comments: useReveal hook in /app/frontend/src/lib/reveal.js has a sensible 2s fallback timer, which protects content from staying hidden if IntersectionObserver misses — good defensive coding.
FinalCta.jsx uses fixed AI_LINKS with target=_blank and rel=noopener noreferrer — correct security posture.
Plans.jsx 'Grow' card highlight (md:-translate-y-3) only triggers at md+ breakpoints — intentional and works.
Process.jsx dotted connecting line is hidden below md (correct, single-column layout).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Page completely redesigned in Invoko-inspired style. All data-testids documented in review request are present and working. Reveal-on-scroll uses a 2s safety fallback so elements always become visible. Use 1920/1024/414 viewports; no horizontal overflow at any size. Only outstanding cosmetic issue is 2 broken platform icons in the hero marquee (simpleicons CDN 404s for 'instagram' and 'linkedin' slugs with the /14183A color suffix).
rca of the issue: Broken icons in hero marquee: https://cdn.simpleicons.org/<slug>/14183A returns 404 for some slugs because the simpleicons CDN API path/color combination is case-sensitive on certain slugs. Reproduction: open DevTools Network tab on the landing page hero -> filter 'cdn.simpleicons.org' -> two 404s. Mitigation: change uppercase hex 14183A to lowercase 14183a, OR drop the color and use CSS filter for tinting, OR self-host the SVGs locally.
